title: Agalmyla biflora
intro: Agalmyla biflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as a type of gesneriad. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Agalmyla biflora include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used in traditional medicine in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules.
